expected_outcome: Competent layout designer capable of structuring modern responsive grids, styling layouts, applying custom variables, and designing sleek micro-animations.

phases.practice_schedule: 1 Hour daily writing style override selectors and modeling box borders.

mini_project.title: Styled Profile Profile Card
mini_project.description: Create a styled profile card displaying images, text hierarchies, custom border radii, shadow effects, and hover transitions.

phases.milestone: Mastered basic styling rules, selector specificity priorities, box sizing limits, and custom typography integrations.

topics.name: Flexbox Layouts
subtopics: Flex grow, shrink, and wrap rules

topics.name: Positions and Displays
subtopics: Display block vs inline-block vs none

phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily alignment mapping using grid structures and flex containers.

mini_project.title: Sleek Dashboard Portal Grid
mini_project.description: Design a dashboard grid showcasing sidebar guides, headers blocks, search details, and nested data cards using CSS Grid.

phases.milestone: Proficient in aligning pages, creating responsive navigation bars, overlaying overlays, and grid layouts.

phases.practice_schedule: 1.5 Hours daily implementing media breakpoints, theme colors, and loading animation spinners.

mini_project.title: Themed Marketing Landing Page
mini_project.description: Develop a landing page that adapts to mobile viewport screens, utilizes CSS variables for dark themes, and features slide-in cards on hover.

phases.milestone: Equipped to construct responsive designs, establish CSS theme setups, and implement smooth visual feedback cues.

major_projects.title: Interactive Responsive Corporate Portal UI
major_projects.description: A layout featuring mobile-responsive columns, custom grid dashboards, animations overlays, smooth transition cards, and light/dark styling toggles via root variables.
